title: Warm Diffusion: Recipe for Blur-Noise Mixture Diffusion Models

title: Taming Text-to-Sounding Video Generation via Advanced Modality Condition and Interaction
problem_statement: The core technical problem is generating synchronized audio-video from text while avoiding modal interference and achieving optimal cross-modal feature interaction. A single shared text caption for both video and audio creates interference that confuses pretrained backbones. The optimal mechanism for cross-modal feature interaction remains unclear.
